title: Wrong ROW_COUNT using admin show ddl jobs when setting tidb_enable_dist_task= on
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table_v2 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, name TEXT NOT NULL, age INTEGER CHECK (age >= 0), created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table_v2 (name, age) VALUES ('Bob', NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table_v2 WHERE age IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: ROW_COUNT shows 0 for indexes with dist task enabled
